findings.issue: organizations.ts does not strip trailing slashes from VITE_API_BASE_URL, unlike every other API module, so a base URL configured with a trailing slash produces double-slash URLs such as https://api.example.com//v1/organizations.
findings.remediation: Change API_BASE to (import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || '').replace(/\/+$/, '') to match api.ts, oauth.ts, and profile.ts.

findings.issue: OAuth provider buttons in LoginPage and InvitationPage do not declare type="button". Although they are not currently inside forms, future layout changes could turn them into submit buttons and cause accidental navigation.
findings.remediation: Add type="button" to the two OAuth providers buttons in LoginPage and to the OAuthButton component in InvitationPage.

findings.issue: During an OAuth login attempt both provider buttons display the same 'Signing in...' label and both are disabled, so a user clicking GitHub sees the Google button also claim it is signing in. This is confusing UX and makes it harder to tell which provider was selected.
findings.remediation: Track which provider is currently loading and only show 'Signing in...' on the clicked button while disabling the other.

findings.issue: Several catch blocks check err instanceof DOMException after already checking err instanceof Error, but DOMException extends Error so the DOMException branch is unreachable dead code.
findings.remediation: Remove the redundant || err instanceof DOMException checks (keep err instanceof Error).

findings.issue: Test files use inconsistent localStorage mocking strategies (globalThis polyfill in oauth.test.ts vs Object.defineProperty(window, 'localStorage', ...) in ProfileProvider.test.tsx), increasing maintenance cost and risk of cross-test leakage.
findings.remediation: Converge on a single test helper for localStorage/sessionStorage mocking, such as the session/local cleanup already used in AppRouter.test.tsx.
